UserData.title: User Data
UserData.description: Stores the balances, goals, and transaction totals for a specific user.

balances.description: The current balance for each piggy bank.

goals.description: The financial goals for each piggy bank.

totalIncome.description: The total income received by the user.

totalExpenses.description: The total expenses spent by the user.

history.description: A log of all financial transactions for the user.

/user_data/{userId}.description: Collection containing the financial data for Malu and Babi.
